allow: PowerShell($avoid = @\(5173, 6287\); $candidates = 4180,4280,4380,4480,4880,3001,3002,8181; foreach \($p in $candidates\) { if \($avoid -contains $p\) { continue }; try { $l = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpListener\([System.Net.IPAddress]::Any, $p\); $l.Start\(\); $l.Stop\(\); "FREE: $p"; break } catch { "BUSY: $p" } })
